articles.title: 5 things to know about new Patriots wide receiver A.J. Brown
articles.description:
A.J. Brown — who grew up as a Patriots fan in Mississippi — will give Drake Maye and New England's offense a significant boost moving forward.

articles.title: Patriots acquire A.J. Brown in blockbuster trade with Eagles

articles.title: David Ortiz says Red Sox owner John Henry is ‘worried’ about the team
articles.description:
